ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TV show */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the TV show image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the TV show trailer */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the TV show was released */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the TV show ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the TV show (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TV show the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Number of the season */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was released */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_tv_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("tv_show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "airdate" TEXT /* Airdate of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the writer */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the writer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the writer's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_directors" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, viewer) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating for the episode */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the episode */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_ratings" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating for the season */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the season */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_ratings" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TV show */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating for the TV show */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the TV show */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_genres" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TV show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_awards" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TV show */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id", "award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_awards" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "award_id")
)
